name: Saucy Shrimp and Pasta
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces frozen shrimps, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4 1/2 quart Dutch oven, bring 4 cups hot water to boiling.
2. Add pasta; cook according to package directions. Drain well.
3. Meanwhile, in a large saucepan stir together tomatoes, cornstarch, parsley, sugar, Italian seasoning, and red pepper.
4. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
5. Stir in shrimp. Return to boiling and cook 1 to 3 minutes or until shrimp turn pink.
6. Serve shrimp mixture over pasta. Garnish with fresh parsley sprigs if desired.
